creator: system@happydoo.com
text:
Hello,

Sorry to post about this old bug, but maybe someone will be interested to known that I had the same problem with the following environment:

FreeBSD 7.1-RELEASE
php5-5.3.2_1       PHP Scripting Language
libxml2-2.7.7       XML parser library for GNOME

I have applied the workaround explained in the thread http://forums.freebsd.org/showthread.php?t=8965 by Giraya
(remove lines from path-configuration and rebuild libxml2).

It's ugly but it works for me.

Thanks,
~~~
EricV
